headline: Saudi Arabia Construction Equipment Industry Research 2026-2031 Featuring Caterpillar, Komatsu, Hitachi, Volvo, Liebherr, SANY, XCMG, LiuGong, JCB, Zoomlion, Hyundai, Kobelco
summary: The Saudi Arabia construction equipment market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 4.71% from 2024 to 2030, driven by Saudi Vision 2030's large-scale infrastructure projects. In 2025, earthmoving equipment, particularly excavators, dominated market share, with the 20-ton excavator being favored. Increasing investment in port and logistics facilities is boosting the demand for forklifts and cranes. headline: Latin America Data Center Construction Industry Outlook 2026-2031 with ABB, Alfa Laval, ASSA ABLOY, Axis Communications, Bosch, Bruno Generators, Caterpillar, Cummins Leading
summary: The Latin America data center construction market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 14.92% from 2025 to 2031, driven by sustainability initiatives and digital transformation. Governments and corporations in the region are prioritizing renewable energy, AI advancements, and energy-efficient infrastructure, positioning Latin America as a hub for green data centers.
